title: Whimsy Deco
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1351466/description_161a1640-2b85-40ce-85ab-334cf0528b13.png)

## Description

Whimsy Deco is a furniture and decor mod aimed at adding high quality and unique pieces of furniture! It adds 80+ unique blocks with various functions for bringing life into your builds.

# Features

## Quality over quantity

Each block only has a handful of fitting variants. Rather than trying to make a variant for every wood type or dye color, blocks come in a limited amount of variants that best fit the block.

## Unique furniture

There are plenty of furniture mods out there that add a bunch of tables, chairs and cabinets. Whimsy Deco is here for everything else! From dartboards to washing machines, there are plenty of furniture blocks you'd have difficulty finding in other mods.

## Gacha Machine

Get exquisite plushies and unique furniture from the Gacha Machine! Gacha Capsules can be purchased using Diamonds!

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1351466/description_ad43dba2-02c2-41b1-af8d-4a61c7267c8d.png)

*   More whimiscal furniture will be added in the future!!

# Dependencies

## Required

*   [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Support

Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/GdcZkrZqkj)!

Originally, this mod was created for the [Sunlit Valley](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/society-sunlit-valley) modpack, but now it has been separated out.
